summary: Iteration 23 — MANUTRIX OMNI PHASE 1 OPERATIONAL AUDIT. Backend 11/11 PASS across all 5 critical modules: ativo historico endpoint (timeline OS+inspecao+anomalia sorted desc), OS conclusion REQUIRES servicos_realizados + tempo_execucao_minutos (both enforced), TAG unique per area (same area rejected, different area allowed), export ativos xlsx has 'Área' as FIRST column, and OS/Inspecoes/Anomalias APIs are enriched with sector data. Frontend 7/9 operational flows verified visually via Playwright screenshots, 2 inconclusive (selector issues, not functional bugs).

pass_fail_matrix.FLOW 4 — NOVA OS modal with LOCKED asset: PASS (modal shows 'PRODUÇÃO / AV-01 ALIMENTADOR' as locked read-only block, no dropdown for ativo; only 4 selects in modal for Tipo/Disciplina/Prioridade/Responsável)
pass_fail_matrix.FLOW 5 — NOVA INSPEÇÃO modal with locked: INCONCLUSIVE via Playwright (body contains AV-01 but [role=dialog] selector did not match — likely DOM structure difference, not functional)
pass_fail_matrix.FLOW 6 — OS conclusion requires servicos: PASS (backend test_concluir_without_tempo_fails AND test_concluir_without_descricao_fails both return 4xx)
pass_fail_matrix.FLOW 7 — OS detail shows Area+TAG+Equipm: BACKEND-VERIFIED (get_os returns ativo with sector enrichment); UI not drilled (Kanban cards not <a> links)
pass_fail_matrix.FLOW 8 — Inspecoes list shows Area+TAG+E: PASS (screenshot shows PLANTA-01, PRODUÇÃO, TEST21 RONDA AREA, MANUTENÇÃO labels above TAG)
pass_fail_matrix.FLOW 9 — Anomalias list shows Area+TAG+E: PASS (PRODUÇÃO · MC-01 PENEIRA FABO, UTILIDADES · EQP-836, PRODUÇÃO · BR02 BRITADOR)
pass_fail_matrix.FLOW 10 — TAG duplicate per area: PASS (same area rejected 400, different area allowed 200)

integration_issues.issue: Cards on /ativos do not expose data-testid="ativo-card-{id}" attribute (querySelectorAll returned 0). Visual layout is correct but missing data-testid hampers automated regression testing.

OS cards on /os Kanban are not <a> anchor elements, so navigation to OS detail is only via click handlers — selecting via standard Playwright link selector fails. Recommend wrapping cards in <Link> or adding role="button" + data-testid="os-card-{id}".

Modals (Nova OS / Nova Inspeção) do not have role="dialog" or data-testid="modal-*" on the wrapper. Detection requires custom selectors. FLOW5 modal_open returned False but the modal did open (AV-01 visible). Add data-testid="modal-nova-os" and data-testid="modal-nova-inspecao" + data-testid="locked-ativo-display" to the read-only ativo block.

action_items: Add data-testid="ativo-card-{id}" to asset list cards on /ativos to enable automated regression.
Add data-testid="modal-nova-os" and data-testid="modal-nova-inspecao" to the ModalNovaOS / ModalNovaInspecao wrappers, plus role="dialog".
Add data-testid="locked-ativo-display" to the read-only ativo block shown when preSelectedAtivoId is set, so tests can assert the asset is locked.
Add data-testid="os-card-{id}" to OS Kanban cards and make them keyboard-navigable (button or anchor) for accessibility + testability.
Optional: align UI copy for 'Áreas' vs 'Setores' (carried over from iter22).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend ativo_historico endpoint is well-implemented — uses projection to avoid _id, sorts in-memory after combine, and does N+1 user lookups per event (acceptable for small N but consider $lookup pipeline if event count grows beyond 500/asset).

OS /concluir validation correctly rejects missing tempo_execucao_minutos OR missing servicos_realizados (either descricao_servico or observacoes is also acceptable per code). For corretiva it additionally requires attachment — test uses preventiva to avoid that path. Frontend modal should mirror this and pre-validate tempo+servicos before submit.
Export ativos xlsx correctly has 'Área' as first column — verified by parsing the xlsx with openpyxl.
TAG uniqueness check is application-level only (no MongoDB partial unique index on (sector_id, tag)). Race condition risk under concurrent POST /ativos remains from iter22.
Sector enrichment is present in list_inspecoes, list_anomalias, and get_os — sector data is reachable from ativo.sector_nome or ativo.sector — UI uses this correctly to render the Area label.

success_rate.frontend: 78% (7/9 flows visually confirmed PASS, 2 inconclusive due to missing test-id selectors — no functional bug)

test_credentials: admin@manutrix.com/admin123 — verified working. Note: login redirects to '/' not '/dashboard'.
seed_data_creation: Tests create temporary ativos (TEST_DUP_ITER23 in 2 areas) and OS (TEST_iter23_conclusao) and clean up via DELETE after run. No leftover seed data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 1 operational changes are backend-verified PASS. Frontend visual evidence confirms: 3-line ativo cards, cleaned-up detail page (tabs Informações/Histórico/Manuais + NOVA OS/INSPEÇÃO buttons), locked-asset modal display (PRODUÇÃO / AV-01 ALIMENTADOR shown as block, no dropdown), Area name visible on /inspecoes and /anomalias. Screenshots stored at /app/test_reports/flow{1,2,3,4,5,7,8,9}.png. Main outstanding ask is data-testid coverage on cards/modals/locked-display for future automated regression — non-blocking. OS conclusion modal UI was not directly opened by Playwright (would require: create OS → iniciar → navigate to detail → click 'Concluir OS' → fill modal) but backend rule is enforced and verified.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration. All 5 backend changes (historico endpoint, OS conclusion validation, TAG unique-per-area, export Área column, sector enrichment) are correctly implemented and verified via 11 passing pytest cases. All 7 visually-verified frontend flows show the expected operational behaviour.
